concerns.text: FR-007 specifies a hard limit of '5,000 per hour', while User Story 1 Acceptance Scenario 1 uses the placeholder '[deferred] calls/hour'. This creates a terminology and value inconsistency within the same requirement scope. The spec should either use '[deferred]' consistently in the FR or explicitly state the 5,000 limit as a fixed constraint if it is not subject to change.

The Assumptions section contains two conflicting placeholders for the same metric: 'The [deferred] pull request sample size' and 'The [deferred] API calls/hour limit'. While placeholders are allowed, the Assumptions section should not contain specific numbers (like 5,000 in FR-007) while simultaneously deferring the same concept in the text. Ensure the '5,000' in FR-007 is intentional and not a copy-paste error from the Idea Md that should have been deferred or removed to match the Assumption style.
